phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la tombe de Grace Kelly ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah tom duh GREHS kel-EE
phrases.cultural_note: Princess Grace (Grace Kelly) is buried in the cathedral's crypt, alongside Prince Rainier III. Her grave is a place of pilgrimage for fans.

responses.english: In the crypt, to the left of the entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, say tun pwahn an-por-TANT duh lees-TWAR loh-KAL
responses.french: Dans la crypte, à gauche de l'entrée.

phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est la messe le dimanche ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR eh lah mess luh dee-MONSH
phrases.cultural_note: Sunday mass is held at 10am. The cathedral is also the site of the Monaco princes' funerals and royal ceremonies.

responses.english: Mass is at ten o'clock on Sunday.
responses.french: La messe est à dix heures le dimanche.

phrases.text_local: Où est le trône de l'évêque ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh trohn duh lay-VEK
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral features a 16th-century bishop's throne in white marble, one of the few surviving examples in the region.

responses.english: In the choir, to the right of the altar.
responses.french: Dans le choeur, à droite de l'autel.

phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures d'ouverture de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz UHR doo-vair-TYOR duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is open daily for visits outside of mass times.

responses.english: From 8:30 AM to 6 PM, except during masses.
responses.phonetic: duh weet UHR trahnt ah dee-ZWEET UHR, soh pahn-DAHN lay MES
responses.french: De huit heures trente à dix-huit heures, sauf pendant les messes.
